description_long: This object is a rectangular, low-profile device with a smooth, flat top and slightly beveled edges, typical of modern routers or modems. The main body is finished in a clean white color, with a subtle blue accent running along the bottom edge, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The front face features a small, faint logo on the left side, but no visible buttons, indicator lights, or ports are present on any of the visible surfaces. The sides and back are plain, with no external antennas or protrusions, suggesting an internal antenna design. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic, with likely internal components such as circuit boards and metal shielding. This device would typically be found in residential or commercial urban environments, placed on desks, shelves, or mounted on walls.
description: A sleek, white rectangular router or modem with a blue accent along the bottom edge and a subtle logo on the front. No visible ports, buttons, or antennas are present.
description_view_0: Front view shows a smooth white face with a small logo on the left and a blue accent at the base.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the device's slim profile and the continuation of the blue accent along the bottom edge.
description_view_2: Rear view is plain, with no visible ports, buttons, or markings, maintaining the minimalist design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the device's flat, unadorned surface and blue accent.
